title: Simplified ESG Disclosure Guide (SEDG) Version 2
subtitle: For SMEs in Supply Chains
publisherAffiliation: Affiliate of the Securities Commission Malaysia (SC)
description: The SEDG is a guide to help companies decide what Environmental, Social and Governance (ESG) disclosures to track and report. It provides SMEs (as data preparers) with a simple and standard set of disclosures to track and report, and stakeholders (as data requesters) with a simple and standard set of disclosures to ask for.
targetUsers: SMEs that are compelled to track and report on ESG data — usually because they want to, they are being asked to, or they want to qualify for incentives.

v2.notes: Three new disclosures added (2 Environmental, 1 Social). Fully aligned with the ASEAN Simplified ESG Disclosure Guide for SMEs in Supply Chains launched by the ASEAN Capital Markets Forum in April 2025.

BASIC.label: Basic
BASIC.description: Entry-level disclosures for companies at early stages of sustainability reporting.

INTERMEDIATE.label: Intermediate
INTERMEDIATE.description: More detailed disclosures for companies with some sustainability reporting experience.

ADVANCED.label: Advanced
ADVANCED.description: Comprehensive disclosures for companies with mature sustainability reporting capabilities.

referenceFrameworks.name: Task Force on Climate-Related Financial Disclosures (TCFD)
GHG Protocol Corporate Accounting and Reporting Standard
GHG Protocol Corporate Value Chain (Scope 3) Standard
Principles-based SRI Taxonomy for the Malaysian Capital Market

topics.name: Emissions
topics.overview: Greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions are a major contributor to climate change and are governed by the UN Framework Convention on Climate Change and the Kyoto Protocol. This topic covers: Carbon dioxide (CO2), Methane (CH4), Nitrous oxide (N2O), Hydrofluorocarbons (HFCs), Perfluorocarbons (PFCs), Sulphur hexafluoride (SF6), and Nitrogen trifluoride (NF3). Reporting is based on the GHG Protocol Corporate Accounting and Reporting Standard and the GHG Protocol Corporate Value Chain (Scope 3) Standard.

disclosures.title: Total Scope 1 GHG emissions
disclosures.description: Report total Scope 1 (direct) GHG emissions in metric tonnes of CO2 equivalent.

disclosures.title: Total Scope 2 GHG emissions
disclosures.description: Report total Scope 2 (indirect) GHG emissions in metric tonnes of CO2 equivalent.

disclosures.title: Scope 1 GHG emissions reduction
disclosures.description: Report total Scope 1 GHG emissions reduced as a direct result of reduction initiatives, in metric tonnes of CO2 equivalent.

disclosures.title: Scope 2 GHG emissions reduction
disclosures.description: Report total Scope 2 GHG emissions reduced as a direct result of reduction initiatives, in metric tonnes of CO2 equivalent.

disclosures.title: Total Scope 3 GHG emissions
disclosures.description: Report total Scope 3 (other indirect) GHG emissions in metric tonnes of CO2 equivalent.

disclosures.title: Scope 3 GHG emissions reduction
disclosures.description: Report total Scope 3 GHG emissions reduced as a direct result of reduction initiatives, in metric tonnes of CO2 equivalent.

disclosures.title: Total Scope 1 and 2 GHG intensity
disclosures.description: Report total Scope 1 and 2 GHG intensity in metric tonnes CO2 equivalent per unit of organisation-specific metrics.
disclosures.unit: metric tonnes CO2 equivalent per unit of organisation-specific metrics

disclosures.title: Energy consumption
disclosures.description: Report the consumption of the following in joules or watthours.

disclosures.title: Energy consumption reduction
disclosures.description: Report the reduction in consumption of the following, achieved as a direct result of conservation and efficiency initiatives, in joules or watthours.

disclosures.title: Total water withdrawn
disclosures.description: Report the total water withdrawn from all areas, and a breakdown of this total by type in litres.

disclosures.title: Total water withdrawn reduction
disclosures.description: Report the reduction in total water withdrawn from all areas, and a breakdown of this total by type in litres.

disclosures.title: Total waste
disclosures.description: Report total waste in metric tonnes.

disclosures.title: Total waste by category
disclosures.description: Report total waste generated, diverted from disposal, and directed to disposal, each broken down into metric tonnes by waste category.

disclosures.title: Waste diverted from disposal by recovery stream
disclosures.description: Report total hazardous and non-hazardous waste diverted from disposal broken down into the following recovery streams in metric tonnes.

disclosures.title: Waste directed to disposal by disposal stream
disclosures.description: Report total hazardous and non-hazardous waste directed to disposal broken down into the following disposal streams in metric tonnes.

subCategories.name: Hazardous
subItems: Directed to disposal (incineration with energy recovery)
Directed to disposal (incineration without energy recovery)

subCategories.name: Non-hazardous
subItems: Directed to disposal (incineration with energy recovery)
Directed to disposal (incineration without energy recovery)

disclosures.title: List of materials for primary products and services
disclosures.description: List the materials and total weights used to produce and package the company's primary products and services in metric tonnes, if any.

disclosures.title: Recycled input materials percentage
disclosures.description: Report the percentage of recycled input materials used to manufacture the company's primary products and services.

disclosures.title: Child labour and forced labour incidents
disclosures.description: Report the number and nature of child labour and forced labour incidents, if any.
subItems: Number of child labour incidents, if any
Nature of child labour incidents, if any
Number of forced labour incidents, if any
Nature of forced labour incidents, if any

disclosures.title: Operations and suppliers with significant labour risk
disclosures.description: List the operations and suppliers considered to have significant risk for incidents of child labour and forced labour, including type of operation or supplier and locations at risk.
subItems: List of operations and suppliers with significant risk of child labour
List of operations and suppliers with significant risk of forced labour

disclosures.title: Average training hours per employee
disclosures.description: Report the average hours of training per employee.

disclosures.title: Total employees and turnover rate
disclosures.description: Report the total number of employees and the turnover rate.

disclosures.title: Employees meeting minimum wage laws
disclosures.description: Report the percentage of employees meeting or above applicable minimum wage laws, if any.

disclosures.title: Employee diversity
disclosures.description: Report the percentage of the company's employees by gender and age.

disclosures.title: Director diversity
disclosures.description: Report the percentage of the company's directors by gender and age.

disclosures.title: Fatalities and injuries
disclosures.description: Report the number of fatalities and injuries in the company, if any.

disclosures.title: Health and safety training
disclosures.description: Report the total number and percentage of employees trained on health and safety standards.
subItems: Number of employees trained in health and safety standards
Percentage of employees trained in health and safety standards

disclosures.title: Community investments and donations
disclosures.description: Report the total amount of community investments and donations.

disclosures.title: Operations with negative community impact
disclosures.description: List the company's operations with negative impact on local communities.

disclosures.title: Number of directors
disclosures.description: Report the number of directors in the company.

disclosures.title: Governance structure
disclosures.description: List the governance structure of the board, including committees of the board and management, if applicable.

disclosures.title: List of company policies
disclosures.description: List the company's policies, including but not limited to: Code of Conduct, Anti-Corruption Policy, Whistleblowing Policy, Health and Safety Policy.

disclosures.title: Year of last audited financial report
disclosures.description: Report the year of the last submitted audited financial report.

disclosures.title: List of operational and activity risks
disclosures.description: List the risks of company operations and activities, including but not limited to: Regulatory compliance risk, Business continuity risk.

disclosures.title: List of sustainability risks
disclosures.description: List the sustainability risks of company if applicable, including but not limited to: Climate-related physical risk, Climate-related transition risk.

disclosures.title: Confirmed corruption incidents
disclosures.description: Report the total number and nature of confirmed incidents of corruption, if any.
subItems: Number of confirmed incidents of corruption, if any
Nature of confirmed incidents of corruption, if any

disclosures.title: Anti-bribery and anti-corruption training
disclosures.description: Report the total number and percentage of employees who have received training on the company's anti-bribery and anti-corruption policy.
subItems: Number of employees trained on anti-bribery and anti-corruption
Percentage of employees trained on anti-bribery and anti-corruption

disclosures.title: List of corruption risks
disclosures.description: List the significant risks related to corruption.

disclosures.title: Customer data privacy complaints
disclosures.description: Report the total number and nature of substantiated complaints received concerning breaches of customer privacy and loss of customer data, if any.
subItems: Number of customer data privacy complaints, if any
Nature of customer data privacy complaints, if any

disclosureTemplate.declarationText: This data report represents our company's disclosures as guided by the Simplified ESG Disclosure Guide (SEDG). It contains information that is true to the best of our knowledge at the time of publication.

metadata.alignedWith: ASEAN Simplified ESG Disclosure Guide for SMEs in Supply Chains (ASEAN Capital Markets Forum, April 2025)
